summary: Plan-only assessment of five open maintainer-ready PRs. No GitHub mutations are recommended. #90154 is routed to central security handling because it changes auth/self-pairing behavior. None of the remaining PRs have complete merge preflight proof, so no merge_candidate action is emitted; #90202 additionally has a failing check that makes repair the next concrete path.

repair_candidate.summary: Repair #90202 by updating the memory-wiki local-import implementation or tests so the failing checks-fast-contracts-plugins-a contract shard passes, then rerun the focused extension and contract validation before merge preflight.
repair_candidate.pr_title: fix(memory-wiki): repair local import plugin contract checks
repair_candidate.pr_body:
Repair path for Clownfish cluster live-pr-inventory-20260617T073528-004.

Source PR: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/90202 by @Sunjae-k / sunjae-1.

This repair should keep the managed local source import scope narrow to memory-wiki config, CLI, local import, and source-sync behavior, address the failing checks-fast-contracts-plugins-a shard, and preserve attribution for the source PR.

Validation:
- pnpm check:changed
- node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/memory-wiki/src/cli.test.ts extensions/memory-wiki/src/config.test.ts extensions/memory-wiki/src/local-import.test.ts extensions/memory-wiki/src/source-sync.test.ts
- rerun checks-fast-contracts-plugins-a
